business_description.nature_of_business: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas

positives: Written contracts with subcontractors are used
Written contracts with indemnification are required from contractors
Fire alarms are hard-wired with central station monitoring
16 years in business and 16 years with current management
concerns: Swimming pools, exercise rooms, or other amenities are present
HVAC replaced in 2022, but plumbing and electrical are original (2005)
EV charging stations are installed on the premises
Building is not fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R
No quality control / quality assurance program
OSHA citations in the past 3 years
No cyber liability protections in place
Prior insurance history reflects multiple claims and a 2022 cancellation
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Prior insurance history shows 11 claims in 2024 with Travelers Companies, 3 claims in 2023 with Markel Corporation, and 6 claims in 2022 with Zurich Insurance Group; the 2022 policy indicates a cancellation.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas. Years in Business: 16. Years with Current Management: 16. Number of Employees (Full-Time): 285. Number of Employees (Part-Time): 165. Annual Revenue / Gross Receipts: $42,000,000. Hours of Operation: Mon-Fri 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Do you have a formal safety program? Yes. Do you have written contracts with all subcontractors? Yes. Is there 24-hour doorman or security on premises? Yes. Are written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors? Yes. Are fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring? Yes. Are Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS) maintained? Yes.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior insurance history: 2024 Travelers Companies, premium $686,236.25, 11 claims, cancellation: No; 2023 Markel Corporation, premium $619,820.26, 3 claims, cancellation: No; 2022 Zurich Insurance Group, premium $607,294.45, 6 claims, cancellation: Yes.
